FR3_full_evidence_ladder.description: No relevant public data rows or only failed downloads.

FR3b_reduced_proxy_evidence_ladder.description: Downloaded literature gives context/phrases only; no numeric proxy table.

evidence_ladder.description: No relevant public data rows or only failed downloads.

FR3.evidence_ladder_note: Top-level FR3 decision and ladder refer to the full parameter-free FR3 scaling only; FR3b is a reduced, non-decisive sanity proxy tracked separately.

falsification_logic.confirm_like: Scale-only fit of E_ELM to P_ped*V_ped*(DeltaP/P)^2 has RMS fractional residual <0.20-0.30 on >=10 well-diagnosed public rows.
falsification_logic.current_script_policy: Do not digitize figure markers by hand; return data_insufficient if no machine-readable public rows exist.
falsification_logic.falsify_like: Public rows cover the variables but RMS residual remains >0.30 or correlation is wrong/null under shot/device controls.

evidence_ladder.description: Downloaded literature gives context/phrases only; no numeric proxy table.

fr3b_reduced_pedestal_pressure_proxy.observable: range-level pedestal pressure vs ELM frequency only; not FR3 energy scaling
fr3b_reduced_pedestal_pressure_proxy.why_not_decisive: Does not include E_ELM, V_pedestal, or DeltaP/P; use only as FR3b sanity proxy.

literature_evidence.range_rows_note: These are collisionality/pedestal/frequency ranges, not sufficient for parameter-free FR3 because E_ELM, V_pedestal, and DeltaP/P are not jointly machine-readable as shot-cycle rows.

crawler_notes.label: Loarte ITPA Type-I ELM energy loss comparison

evidence_ladder.description: Proxy is directionally/window compatible, but not decisive or not robust enough.

falsification_logic.confirm_like: Positive sign and approximately linear f_ELM response to applied separatrix perturbation proxy.
falsification_logic.falsify_like: Negative or zero correlation after extracting comparable RMP/helicity rows, or no correlation once q-profile/equilibrium controls are available.

helicity_quality_tiers.1: coil current plus ELM/frequency text extracted
helicity_quality_tiers.2: coil current plus mode number or q-profile proxy extracted
helicity_quality_tiers.3: public equilibrium/coil geometry sufficient for true separatrix perturbation/helicity proxy

tier_definitions.1: coil current plus ELM/frequency text extracted
tier_definitions.2: coil current plus mode number or q-profile proxy extracted
tier_definitions.3: public equilibrium/coil geometry sufficient for true separatrix perturbation/helicity proxy

multi_paper_text_proxy.tier_quality_note: Tier 2 requires current plus n/q hint; Tier 3 still requires public equilibrium/coil geometry and is not reached by text extraction.

FR6.proxy_definition: |H_mag| proxy = max(I_RMP - I_threshold, 0) for fixed n=4 MAST configuration; this tests sign/linearity, not true helicity integral.

generated_note: All source artifacts are downloaded by this script. No manual files are used.

proxy_quality.FR3: strict but likely data-insufficient until a public CSV/Excel supplement is found
proxy_quality.FR6: sign-level applied-field proxy; true helicity integral requires public equilibrium/RMP coil geometry and q-profile reconstructions
